reason: Check agent verifies vue-tsc passes, the 3 commits are atomic, no console.log / dead CSS classes (.tool-card__output replaced by --output) leftover, and the new watchers in MessageList don't introduce memory leaks (no event listeners to clean up)
Verify ToolCallCard's input caret + output caret stay consistent (input's <details> caret predates this PR; output got a new <details> with the same caret CSS via .tool-card__details)

Verify markRaw is applied at the right lifecycle points: rehydrateMessages (after merge step) AND handleChatEvent done/error (terminal). The streaming path must stay reactive (push into toolCalls/toolResults MUST trigger UI), so markRaw only on terminal events
Verify markRaw'd arrays still type-check (markRaw is a type helper returning the same T); outputSize computed returns string; isNearBottom takes HTMLElement + threshold number
